title: YTP: The Link & King Show in The Polter-Link
description:
Episode 8: The King digs up the infamous Majora's Mask that unleashes a curse on the castle, reviving ghost, the dead from their graves and.....Angry Birds. Can Link, the King and Zelda survive this hell hole? 
The show is filmed in front of a live studio audience.
